5C%5Cn%5C%5Cn%5C%5Cnclass+RetryableTaskError%28TaskExecutionError%29%3A%5C%5Cn++++def+__init__%28self%2C+message%3A+str%29%3A%5C%5Cn++++++++super%28%29.__init__%28message%2C+retryable%3DTrue%29%5C%5Cn%5C%5Cn%5C%5Cnclass+FatalTaskError%28TaskExecutionError%29%3A%5C%5Cn++++def+__init__%28self%2C+message%3A+str%29%3A%5C%5Cn++++++++super%28%29.__init__%28message%2C+retryable%3DFalse%29%5C%5Cn%5C%5Cn%5C%5Cnclass+JobCancelledError%28TaskExecutionError%29%3A%5C%5Cn++++def+__init__%28self%2C+message%3A+str+%3D+%5C%5C%5C%22job+canceled%5C%5C%5C%22%29%3A%5C%5Cn++++++++super%28%29.__init__%28message%2C+retryable%3DFalse%29%5C%5Cn%5C%5Cn%5C%5Cn%40dataclass%28slots%3DTrue%29%5C%5Cnclass+TaskContext%3A%5C%5Cn++++job_id%3A+str%5C%5Cn++++attempt%3A+int%5C%5Cn++++should_cancel%3A+Callable%5B%5B%5D%2C+bool%5D%5C%5Cn%5C%5Cn++++async+def+checkpoint%28self%29+-%3E+None%3A%5C%5Cn++++++++if+self.should_cancel%28%29%3A%5C%5Cn++++++++++++raise+JobCancelledError%28%29%5C%5Cn++++++++await+asyncio.sleep%280%29%5C%5Cn%5C%5Cn%5C%5CnTaskHandler+%3D+Callable%5B%5BTaskContext%2C+BaseModel%5D%2C+Awaitable%5Bdict%5Bstr%2C+Any%5D+%7C+None%5D%5D%5C%5Cn%5C%5Cn%5C%5Cn%40dataclass%28slots%3DTrue%29%5C%5Cnclass+TaskSpec%3A%5C%5Cn++++name%3A+str%5C%5Cn++++payload_model%3A+type%5BBaseModel%5D%5C%5Cn++++handler%3A+TaskHandler%5C%5Cn++++backoff_policy%3A+BackoffPolicy%5C%5Cn%5C%5Cn%5C%5Cnclass+TaskRegistry%3A%5C%5Cn++++def+__init__%28self%29+-%3E+None%3A%5C%5Cn++++++++self._tasks%3A+dict%5Bstr%2C+TaskSpec%5D+%3D+%7B%7D%5C%5Cn%5C%5Cn++++def+register%28self%2C+spec%3A+TaskSpec%29+-%3E+None%3A%5C%5Cn++++++++if+spec.name+in+self._tasks%3A%5C%5Cn++++++++++++raise+ValueError%28f%5C%5C%5C%22Task+type+already+registered%3A+%7Bspec.name%7D%5C%5C%5C%22%29%5C%5Cn++++++++self._tasks%5Bspec.name%5D+%3D+spec%5C%5Cn%5C%5Cn++++def+get%28self%2C+task_type%3A+str%29+-%3E+TaskSpec%3A%5C%5Cn++++++++try%3A%5C%5Cn++++++++++++return+self._tasks%5Btask_type%5D%5C%5Cn++++++++except+KeyError+as+exc%3A%5C%5Cn++++++++++++raise+FatalTaskError%28f%5C%5C%5C%22Unknown+task+type%3A+%7Btask_type%7D%5C%5C%5C%22%29+from+exc%5C%5Cn%5C%5Cn++++async+def+execute%28%5C%5Cn++++++++self%2C%5C%5Cn++++++++task_type%3A+str%2C%5C%5Cn++++++++payload%3A+dict%5Bstr%2C+Any%5D%2C%5C%5Cn++++++++context%3A+TaskContext%2C%5C%5Cn++++%29+-%3E+dict%5Bstr%2C+Any%5D+%7C+None%3A%5C%5Cn++++++++spec+%3D+self.get%28task_type%29%5C%5Cn++++++++try%3A%5C%5Cn++++++++++++validated+%3D+spec.payload_model.model_validate%28payload%29%5C%5Cn++++++++except+ValidationError+as+exc%3A%5C%5Cn++++++++++++raise+FatalTaskError%28f%5C%5C%5C%22Invalid+payload+for+%7Btask_type%7D%3A+%7Bexc%7D%5C%5C%5C%22%29+from+exc%5C%5Cn%5C%5Cn++++++++return+await+spec.handler%28context%2C+validated%29%5C%5Cn%5C%5Cn++++def+backoff_for%28self%2C+task_type%3A+str%29+-%3E+BackoffPolicy%3A%5C%5Cn++++++++return+self.get%28task_type%29.backoff_policy%5C%5Cn%5C%5Cn++++def+names%28self%29+-%3E+list%5Bstr%5D%3A%5C%5Cn++++++++return+sorted%28self._tasks.keys%28%29%29%5C%5Cn%27%40+%7C+Set-Content+-Path+mini_celery%5C%5C%5C%5Ctasks%5C%5C%5C%5Cbase.py%5C%22%2C%5C%22workdir%5C%22%3A%5C%22REDACTED%22%7D%22%2C%22call_id%22%3A%22REDACTED%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22shell_command%22%7D%5D%2C%22parallel_tool_calls%22%3Atrue%2C%22presence_penalty%22%3A0.0%2C%22previous_response_id%22%3Anull%2C%22prompt_cache_key%22%3A%22019cbc1f-e440-72b2-a9a8-c0508695c2d9%22%2C%22prompt_cache_retention%22%3Anull%2C%22reasoning%22%3A%7B%22effort%22%3A%22xhigh%22%2C%22summary%22%3A%22detailed%22%7D%2C%22safety_identifier%22%3A%22REDACTED%22%2C%22service_tier%22%3A%22default%22%2C%22store%22%3Afalse%2C%22temperature%22%3A1.0%2C%22text%22%3A%7B%22format%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22text%22%7D%2C%22verbosity%22%3A%22low%22%7D%2C%22tool_choice%22%3A%22auto%22%2C%22tools%22%3A%5B%7B%22type%22%3A%22function%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22Runs+a+Powershell+command+%28Windows%29+and+returns+its+output.%5Cn%5CnExamples+of+valid+command+strings%3A%5Cn%5Cn-+ls+-a+%28show+hidden%29%3A+%5C%22Get-ChildItem+-Force%5C%22%5Cn-+recursive+find+by+name%3A+%5C%22Get-ChildItem+-Recurse+-Filter+%2A.py%5C%22%5Cn-+recursive+grep%3A+%5C%22Get-ChildItem+-Path+REDACTED%27TODO%27+-CaseSensitive%5C%22%5Cn-+ps+aux+%7C+grep+python%3A+%5C%22Get-Process+%7C+Where-Object+%7B+%24_.ProcessName+-like+%27%2Apython%2A%27+%7D%5C%22%5Cn-+setting+an+env+var%3A+%5C%22%24env%3AFOO%3D%27bar%27%3B+echo+%24env%3AFOO%5C%22%5Cn-+running+an+inline+Python+script%3A+%5C%22%40%27%5C%5C%5C%5Cnprint%28%27Hello%2C+world%21%27%29%5C%5C%5C%5Cn%27%40+%7C+python+-%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22shell_command%22%2C%22parameters%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22object%22%2C%22properties%22%3A%7B%22command%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The+shell+script+to+execute+in+the+user%27s+default+shell%22%7D%2C%22justification%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22Only+set+if+sandbox_permissions+is+%5C%5C%5C%22require_escalated%5C%5C%5C%22.%5Cn++++++++++++++++++++Request+approval+from+the+user+to+run+this+command+outside+the+sandbox.%5Cn++++++++++++++++++++Phrased+as+a+simple+question+that+summarizes+the+purpose+of+the%5Cn++++++++++++++++++++command+as+it+relates+to+the+task+at+hand+-+e.g.+%27Do+you+want+to%5Cn++++++++++++++++++++fetch+and+pull+the+latest+version+of+this+git+branch%3F%27%22%7D%2C%22login%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22boolean%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22Whether+to+run+the+shell+with+login+shell+semantics.+Defaults+to+true.%22%7D%2C%22prefix_rule%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22array%22%2C%22items%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%7D%2C%22description%22%3A%22Only+specify+when+sandbox_permissions+is+%60require_escalated%60.%5Cn++++++++++++++++++++++++Suggest+a+prefix+command+pattern+that+will+allow+you+to+fulfill+similar+requests+from+the+user+in+the+future.%5Cn++++++++++++++++++++++++Should+be+a+short+but+reasonable+prefix%2C+e.g.+%5B%5C%5C%5C%22git%5C%5C%5C%22%2C+%5C%5C%5C%22pull%5C%5C%5C%22%5D+or+%5B%5C%5C%5C%22uv%5C%5C%5C%22%2C+%5C%5C%5C%22run%5C%5C%5C%22%5D+or+%5B%5C%5C%5C%22pytest%5C%5C%5C%22%5D.%22%7D%2C%22sandbox_permissions%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22Sandbox+permissions+for+the+command.+Set+to+%5C%22require_escalated%5C%22+to+request+running+without+sandbox+restrictions%3B+defaults+to+%5C%22use_default%5C%22.%22%7D%2C%22timeout_ms%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22number%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The+timeout+for+the+command+in+milliseconds%22%7D%2C%22workdir%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The+working+directory+to+execute+the+command+in%22%7D%7D%2C%22required%22%3A%5B%22command%22%5D%2C%22additionalProperties%22%3Afalse%7D%2C%22strict%22%3Afalse%7D%2C%7B%22type%22%3A%22function%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22Lists+resources+provided+by+MCP+servers.+Resources+allow+servers+to+share+data+that+provides+context+to+language+models%2C+such+as+files%2C+database+schemas%2C+or+application-specific+information.+Prefer+resources+over+web+search+when+possible.%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22list_mcp_resources%22%2C%22parameters%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22object%22%2C%22properties%22%3A%7B%22cursor%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22Opaque+cursor+returned+by+a+previous+list_mcp_resources+call+for+the+same+server.%22%7D%2C%22server%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22Optional+MCP+server+name.+When+omitted%2C+lists+resources+from+every+configured+server.%22%7D%7D%2C%22additionalProperties%22%3Afalse%7D%2C%22strict%22%3Afalse%7D%2C%7B%22type%22%3A%22function%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22Lists+resource+templates+provided+by+MCP+servers.+Parameterized+resource+templates+allow+servers+to+share+data+that+takes+parameters+and+provides+context+to+language+models%2C+such+as+files%2C+database+schemas%2C+or+application-specific+information.+Prefer+resource+templates+over+web+search+when+possible.%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22list_mcp_resource_templates%22%2C%22parameters%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22object%22%2C%22properties%22%3A%7B%22cursor%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22Opaque+cursor+returned+by+a+previous+list_mcp_resource_templates+call+for+the+same+server.%22%7D%2C%22server%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22Optional+MCP+server+name.+When+omitted%2C+lists+resource+templates+from+all+configured+servers.%22%7D%7D%2C%22additionalProperties%22%3Afalse%7D%2C%22strict%22%3Afalse%7D%2C%7B%22type%22%3A%22function%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22Read+a+specific+resource+from+an+MCP+server+given+the+server+name+and+resource+URI.%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22read_mcp_resource%22%2C%22parameters%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22object%22%2C%22properties%22%3A%7B%22server%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22MCP+server+name+exactly+as+configured.+Must+match+the+%27server%27+field+returned+by+list_mcp_resources.%22%7D%2C%22uri%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22Resource+URI+to+read.+Must+be+one+of+the+URIs+returned+by+list_mcp_resources.%22%7D%7D%2C%22required%22%3A%5B%22server%22%2C%22uri%22%5D%2C%22additionalProperties%22%3Afalse%7D%2C%22strict%22%3Afalse%7D%2C%7B%22type%22%3A%22function%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22Updates+the+task+plan.%5CnProvide+an+optional+explanation+and+a+list+of+plan+items%2C+each+with+a+step+and+status.%5CnAt+most+one+step+can+be+in_progress+at+a+time.%5Cn%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22update_plan%22%2C%22parameters%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22object%22%2C%22properties%22%3A%7B%22explanation%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%7D%2C%22plan%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22array%22%2C%22items%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22object%22%2C%22properties%22%3A%7B%22status%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22One+of%3A+pending%2C+in_progress%2C+completed%22%7D%2C%22step%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%7D%7D%2C%22required%22%3A%5B%22step%22%2C%22status%22%5D%2C%22additionalProperties%22%3Afalse%7D%2C%22description%22%3A%22The+list+of+steps%22%7D%7D%2C%22required%22%3A%5B%22plan%22%5D%2C%22additionalProperties%22%3Afalse%7D%2C%22strict%22%3Afalse%7D%2C%7B%22type%22%3A%22function%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22Request+user+input+for+one+to+three+short+questions+and+wait+for+the+response.+This+tool+is+only+available+in+Plan+mode.%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22request_user_input%22%2C%22parameters%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22object%22%2C%22properties%22%3A%7B%22questions%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22array%22%2C%22items%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22object%22%2C%22properties%22%3A%7B%22header%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22Short+header+label+shown+in+the+UI+%2812+or+fewer+chars%29.%22%7D%2C%22id%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22Stable+identifier+for+mapping+answers+%28snake_case%29.%22%7D%2C%22options%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22array%22%2C%22items%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22object%22%2C%22properties%22%3A%7B%22description%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22One+short+sentence+explaining+impact%2Ftradeoff+if+selected.%22%7D%2C%22label%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22User-facing+label+%281-5+words%29.%22%7D%7D%2C%22required%22%3A%5B%22label%22%2C%22description%22%5D%2C%22additionalProperties%22%3Afalse%7D%2C%22description%22%3A%22Provide+2-3+mutually+exclusive+choices.+Put+the+recommended+option+first+and+suffix+its+label+with+%5C%22%28Recommended%29%5C%22.+Do+not+include+an+%5C%22Other%5C%22+option+in+this+list%3B+the+client+will+add+a+free-form+%5C%22Other%5C%22+option+automatically.%22%7D%2C%22question%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22Single-sentence+prompt+shown+to+the+user.%22%7D%7D%2C%22required%22%3A%5B%22id%22%2C%22header%22%2C%22question%22%2C%22options%22%5D%2C%22additionalProperties%22%3Afalse%7D%2C%22description%22%3A%22Questions+to+show+the+user.+Prefer+1+and+do+not+exceed+3%22%7D%7D%2C%22required%22%3A%5B%22questions%22%5D%2C%22additionalProperties%22%3Afalse%7D%2C%22strict%22%3Afalse%7D%2C%7B%22type%22%3A%22function%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22View+a+local+image+from+the+filesystem+%28only+use+if+given+a+full+filepath+by+the+user%2C+and+the+image+isn%27t+already+attached+to+the+thread+context+within+%3Cimage+...%3E+tags%29.%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22view_image%22%2C%22parameters%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22object%22%2C%22properties%22%3A%7B%22path%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22Local+filesystem+path+to+an+image+file%22%7D%7D%2C%22required%22%3A%5B%22path%22%5D%2C%22additionalProperties%22%3Afalse%7D%2C%22strict%22%3Afalse%7D%2C%7B%22type%22%3A%22function%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22Add+a+comment+to+a+page+or+specific+content.%5CnCreates+a+new+comment.+Provide+%60page_id%60+to+identify+the+page%2C+then+choose+ONE+targeting+mode%3A%5Cn-+%60page_id%60+alone%3A+Page-level+comment+on+the+entire+page%5Cn-+%60page_id%60+++%60selection_with_ellipsis%60%3A+Comment+on+specific+block+content%5Cn-+%60discussion_id%60%3A+Reply+to+an+existing+discussion+thread+%28page_id+is+still+required%29%5Cn%5CnFor+content+targeting%2C+use+%60selection_with_ellipsis%60+with+~10+chars+from+start+and+end%3A+%5C%22%23+Section+Ti...tle+content%5C%22%5Cn%3Cexample+description%3D%5C%22Page-level+comment%5C%22%3E%5Cn%7B%5C%22page_id%5C%22%3A+%5C%22uuid%5C%22%2C+%5C%22rich_text%5C%22%3A+%5B%7B%5C%22text%5C%22%3A+%7B%5C%22content%5C%22%3A+%5C%22Comment%5C%22%7D%7D%5D%7D%5Cn%3C%2Fexample%3E%5Cn%3Cexample+description%3D%5C%22Comment+on+specific+content%5C%22%3E%5Cn%7B%5C%22page_id%5C%22%3A+%5C%22uuid%5C%22%2C+%5C%22selection_with_ellipsis%5C%22%3A+%5C%22%23+Meeting+No...es+heading%5C%22%2C%5Cn+%5C%22rich_text%5C%22%3A+%5B%7B%5C%22text%5C%22%3A+%7B%5C%22content%5C%22%3A+%5C%22Comment+on+this+section%5C%22%7D%7D%5D%7D%5Cn%3C%2Fexample%3E%5Cn%3Cexample+description%3D%5C%22Reply+to+discussion%5C%22%3E%5Cn%7B%5C%22page_id%5C%22%3A+%5C%22uuid%5C%22%2C+%5C%22discussion_id%5C%22%3A+%5C%22discussion%3A%2F%2FpageId%2FblockId%2FdiscussionId%5C%22%2C%5Cn+%5C%22rich_text%5C%22%3A+%5B%7B%5C%22text%5C%22%3A+%7B%5C%22content%5C%22%3A+%5C%22Reply%5C%22%7D%7D%5D%7D%5Cn%3C%2Fexample%3E%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22mcp__notion__notion-create-comment%22%2C%22parameters%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22object%22%2C%22properties%22%3A%7B%22discussion_id%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The+ID+or+URL+of+an+existing+discussion+to+reply+to+%28e.g.%2C+discussion%3A%2F%2FpageId%2FblockId%2FdiscussionId%29.%22%7D%2C%22page_id%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The+ID+of+the+page+to+comment+on+%28with+or+without+dashes%29.%22%7D%2C%22rich_text%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22array%22%2C%22items%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%7D%2C%22description%22%3A%22An+array+of+rich+text+objects+that+represent+the+content+of+the+comment.%22%7D%2C%22selection_with_ellipsis%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22Unique+start+and+end+snippet+of+the+content+to+comment+on.+DO+NOT+provide+the+entire+string.+Instead%2C+provide+up+to+the+first+~10+characters%2C+an+ellipsis%2C+and+then+up+to+the+last+~10+characters.+Make+sure+you+provide+enough+of+the+start+and+end+snippet+to+uniquely+identify+the+content.+For+example%3A+%5C%22%23+Section+heading...last+paragraph.%5C%22%22%7D%7D%2C%22required%22%3A%5B%22rich_text%22%2C%22page_id%22%5D%2C%22additionalProperties%22%3Afalse%7D%2C%22strict%22%3Afalse%7D%2C%7B%22type%22%3A%22function%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22Creates+a+new+Notion+database+using+SQL+DDL+syntax.%5CnIf+no+title+property+provided%2C+%5C%22Name%5C%22+is+auto-added.+Returns+Markdown+with+schema%2C+SQLite+definition%2C+and+data+source+ID+in+%3Cdata-source%3E+tag+for+use+with+update_data_source+and+query_data_sources+tools.%5CnThe+schema+param+accepts+a+CREATE+TABLE+statement+defining+columns.%5CnType+syntax%3A%5Cn-+Simple%3A+TITLE%2C+RICH_TEXT%2C+DATE%2C+PEOPLE%2C+CHECKBOX%2C+URL%2C+EMAIL%2C+PHONE_NUMBER%2C+STATUS%2C+FILES%5Cn-+SELECT%28%27opt%27%3Acolor%2C+...%29+%2F+MULTI_SELECT%28%27opt%27%3Acolor%2C+...%29%5Cn-+NUMBER+%5BFORMAT+%27dollar%27%5D+%2F+FORMULA%28%27expression%27%29%5Cn-+RELATION%28%27data_source_id%27%29+%E2%80%94+one-way+relation%5Cn-+RELATION%28%27data_source_id%27%2C+DUAL%29+%E2%80%94+two-way+relation%5Cn-+RELATION%28%27data_source_id%27%2C+DUAL+%27synced_name%27%29+%E2%80%94+two-way+with+synced+property+name%5Cn-+RELATION%28%27data_source_id%27%2C+DUAL+%27synced_name%27+%27synced_id%27%29+%E2%80%94+two-way+with+synced+name+and+ID+%28for+self-relations%29%5Cn-+ROLLUP%28%27rel_prop%27%2C+%27target_prop%27%2C+%27function%27%29%5Cn-+UNIQUE_ID+%5BPREFIX+%27X%27%5D+%2F+CREATED_TIME+%2F+LAST_EDITED_TIME%5Cn-+Any+column%3A+COMMENT+%27description+text%27+Colors%3A+default%2C+gray%2C+brown%2C+orange%2C+yellow%2C+green%2C+blue%2C+purple%2C+pink%2C+red%5Cn%5Cn%3Cexample+description%3D%5C%22Minimal%5C%22%3E%7B%5C%22schema%5C%22%3A+%5C%22CREATE+TABLE+%28%5C%22Name%5C%22+TITLE%29%5C%22%7D%3C%2Fexample%3E%5Cn%3Cexample+description%3D%5C%22Task+DB%5C%22%3E%7B%5C%22title%5C%22%3A+%5C%22Tasks%5C%22%2C+%5C%22schema%5C%22%3A+%5C%22CREATE+TABLE+%28%5C%22Task+Name%5C%22+TITLE%2C+%5C%22Status%5C%22+SELECT%28%27To+Do%27%3Ared%2C+%27Done%27%3Agreen%29%2C+%5C%22Due+Date%5C%22+DATE%29%5C%22%7D%3C%2Fexample%3E%5Cn%3Cexample+description%3D%5C%22With+parent+and+options%5C%22%3E%7B%5C%22parent%5C%22%3A+%7B%5C%22page_id%5C%22%3A+%5C%22REDACTED%5C%22%7D%2C+%5C%22title%5C%22%3A+%5C%22Projects%5C%22%2C+%5C%22schema%5C%22%3A+%5C%22CREATE+TABLE+%28%5C%22Name%5C%22+TITLE%2C+%5C%22Budget%5C%22+NUMBER+FORMAT+%27dollar%27%2C+%5C%22Tags%5C%22+MULTI_SELECT%28%27eng%27%3Ablue%2C+%27design%27%3Apink%29%2C+%5C%22Task+ID%5C%22+UNIQUE_ID+PREFIX+%27PRJ%27%29%5C%22%7D%3C%2Fexample%3E%5Cn%3Cexample+description%3D%5C%22Self-relation+%28two-step%3A+create+database+first%2C+then+use+its+data+source+ID+with+update_data_source+to+add+self-relations%29%5C%22%3E%7B%5C%22title%5C%22%3A+%5C%22Tasks%5C%22%2C+%5C%22schema%5C%22%3A+%5C%22CREATE+TABLE+%28%5C%22Name%5C%22+TITLE%2C+%5C%22Parent%5C%22+RELATION%28%27ds_id%27%2C+DUAL+%27Children%27+%27children%27%29%2C+%5C%22Children%5C%22+RELATION%28%27ds_id%27%2C+DUAL+%27Parent%27+%27parent%27%29%29%5C%22%7D%3C%2Fexample%3E%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22mcp__notion__notion-create-database%22%2C%22parameters%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22object%22%2C%22properties%22%3A%7B%22description%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The+description+of+the+new+database.%22%7D%2C%22parent%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22object%22%2C%22properties%22%3A%7B%22page_id%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The+ID+of+the+parent+page+%28with+or+without+dashes%29%2C+for+example%2C+REDACTED%22%7D%2C%22type%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%7D%7D%2C%22required%22%3A%5B%22page_id%22%5D%2C%22additionalProperties%22%3Atrue%7D%2C%22schema%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22SQL+DDL+CREATE+TABLE+statement+defining+the+database+schema.+Column+names+must+be+double-quoted%2C+type+options+use+single+quotes.%22%7D%2C%22title%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The+title+of+the+new+database.%22%7D%7D%2C%22required%22%3A%5B%22schema%22%5D%2C%22additionalProperties%22%3Afalse%7D%2C%22strict%22%3Afalse%7D%2C%7B%22type%22%3A%22function%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22%23%23+Overview%5CnCreates+one+or+more+Notion+pages%2C+with+the+specified+properties+and+content.%5Cn%23%23+Parent%5CnAll+pages+created+with+a+single+call+to+this+tool+will+have+the+same+parent.+The+parent+can+be+a+Notion+page+%28%5C%22page_id%5C%22%29+or+data+source+%28%5C%22data_source_id%5C%22%29.+If+the+parent+is+omitted%2C+the+pages+are+created+as+standalone%2C+workspace-level+private+pages%2C+and+the+person+that+created+them+can+organize+them+later+as+they+see+fit.%5CnIf+you+have+a+database+URL%2C+ALWAYS+pass+it+to+the+%5C%22fetch%5C%22+tool+first+to+get+the+schema+and+URLs+of+each+data+source+under+the+database.+You+can%27t+use+the+%5C%22database_id%5C%22+parent+type+if+the+database+has+more+than+one+data+source%2C+so+you%27ll+need+to+identify+which+%5C%22data_source_id%5C%22+to+use+based+on+the+situation+and+the+results+from+the+fetch+tool+%28data+source+URLs+look+like+collection%3A%2F%2F%3Cdata_source_id%3E%29.%5CnIf+you+know+the+pages+should+be+created+under+a+data+source%2C+do+NOT+use+the+database+ID+or+URL+under+the+%5C%22page_id%5C%22+parameter%3B+%5C%22page_id%5C%22+is+only+for+regular%2C+non-database+pages.%5Cn%23%23+Content%5CnNotion+page+content+is+a+string+in+Notion-flavored+Markdown+format.%5CnDon%27t+include+the+page+title+at+the+top+of+the+page%27s+content.+Only+include+it+under+%5C%22properties%5C%22.%5Cn%2A%2AIMPORTANT%2A%2A%3A+For+the+complete+Markdown+specification%2C+always+first+fetch+the+MCP+resource+at+%60notion%3A%2F%2Fdocs%2Fenhanced-markdown-spec%60.+Do+NOT+guess+or+hallucinate+Markdown+syntax.+This+spec+is+also+applicable+to+other+tools+like+update-page+and+fetch.%5Cn%23%23+Properties%5CnNotion+page+properties+are+a+JSON+map+of+property+names+to+SQLite+values.%5CnWhen+creating+pages+in+a+database%3A%5Cn-+Use+the+correct+property+names+from+the+data+source+schema+shown+in+the+fetch+tool+results.%5Cn-+Always+include+a+title+property.+Data+sources+always+have+exactly+one+title+property%2C+but+it+may+not+be+named+%5C%22title%5C%22%2C+so%2C+again%2C+rely+on+the+fetched+data+source+schema.%5Cn%5CnFor+pages+outside+of+a+database%3A%5Cn-+The+only+allowed+property+is+%5C%22title%5C%22%2C%5Ctwhich+is+the+title+of+the+page+in+inline+markdown+format.+Always+include+a+%5C%22title%5C%22+property.%5Cn%5Cn%2A%2AIMPORTANT%2A%2A%3A+Some+property+types+require+expanded+formats%3A%5Cn-+Date+properties%3A+Split+into+%5C%22date%3A%7Bproperty%7D%3Astart%5C%22%2C+%5C%22date%3A%7Bproperty%7D%3Aend%5C%22+%28optional%29%2C+and+%5C%22date%3A%7Bproperty%7D%3Ais_datetime%5C%22+%280+or+1%29%5Cn-+Place+properties%3A+Split+into+%5C%22place%3A%7Bproperty%7D%3Aname%5C%22%2C+%5C%22place%3A%7Bproperty%7D%3Aaddress%5C%22%2C+%5C%22place%3A%7Bproperty%7D%3Alatitude%5C%22%2C+%5C%22place%3A%7Bproperty%7D%3Alongitude%5C%22%2C+and+%5C%22place%3A%7Bproperty%7D%3Agoogle_place_id%5C%22+%28optional%29%5Cn-+Number+properties%3A+Use+JavaScript+numbers+%28not+strings%29%5Cn-+Checkbox+properties%3A+Use+%5C%22__YES__%5C%22+for+checked%2C+%5C%22__NO__%5C%22+for+unchecked%5Cn%5Cn%2A%2ASpecial+property+naming%2A%2A%3A+Properties+named+%5C%22id%5C%22+or+%5C%22url%5C%22+%28case+insensitive%29+must+be+prefixed+with+%5C%22REDACTED%3A%5C%22+%28e.g.%2C+%5C%22REDACTED%3AURL%5C%22%2C+%5C%22REDACTED%3Aid%5C%22%29%5Cn%23%23+Templates%5CnWhen+creating+a+page+in+a+database%2C+you+can+apply+a+template+to+pre-populate+it+with+content+and+property+values.+Use+the+%5C%22fetch%5C%22+tool+on+a+database+to+see+available+templates+in+the+%3Ctemplates%3E+section+of+each+data+source.%5CnWhen+using+a+template%3A%5Cn-+Pass+the+template%27s+ID+as+%5C%22template_id%5C%22+in+the+page+object.%5Cn-+Do+NOT+include+%5C%22content%5C%22+when+using+a+template%2C+as+the+template+provides+it.%5Cn-+You+can+still+set+%5C%22properties%5C%22+alongside+the+template+to+override+template+defaults.%5Cn-+Template+application+is+asynchronous.+The+page+is+created+immediately+but+starts+blank%3B+the+template+content+will+appear+shortly+after.%5Cn%5Cn%23%23+Examples%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%3Cexample+description%3D%5C%22Create+a+page+from+a+database+template%5C%22%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%7B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22parent%5C%22%3A+%7B%5C%22data_source_id%5C%22%3A+%5C%22REDACTED%5C%22%7D%2C%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22pages%5C%22%3A+%5B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%7B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22template_id%5C%22%3A+%5C%22REDACTED%5C%22%2C%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22properties%5C%22%3A+%7B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22Task+Name%5C%22%3A+%5C%22New+urgent+bug%5C%22%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%7D%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%7D%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5D%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%7D%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%3C%2Fexample%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%3Cexample+description%3D%5C%22Create+a+standalone+page+with+a+title+and+content%5C%22%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%7B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22pages%5C%22%3A+%5B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%7B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22properties%5C%22%3A+%7B%5C%22title%5C%22%3A+%5C%22Page+title%5C%22%7D%2C%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22content%5C%22%3A+%5C%22%23+Section+1+%7Bcolor%3D%5C%22blue%5C%22%7D%5CnSection+1+content%5Cn%3Cdetails%3E%5Cn%3Csummary%3EToggle+block%3C%2Fsummary%3E%5Cn%5CtHidden+content+inside+toggle%5Cn%3C%2Fdetails%3E%5C%22%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%7D%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5D%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%7D%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%3C%2Fexample%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%3Cexample+description%3D%5C%22Create+a+page+under+a+database%27s+data+source%5C%22%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%7B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22parent%5C%22%3A+%7B%5C%22data_source_id%5C%22%3A+%5C%22REDACTED%5C%22%7D%2C%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22pages%5C%22%3A+%5B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%7B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22properties%5C%22%3A+%7B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22Task+Name%5C%22%3A+%5C%22Task+123%5C%22%2C%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22Status%5C%22%3A+%5C%22In+Progress%5C%22%2C%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22Priority%5C%22%3A+5%2C%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22Is+Complete%5C%22%3A+%5C%22__YES__%5C%22%2C%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22date%3ADue+Date%3Astart%5C%22%3A+%5C%222024-12-25%5C%22%2C%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22date%3ADue+Date%3Ais_datetime%5C%22%3A+0%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%7D%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%7D%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5D%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%7D%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%3C%2Fexample%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%3Cexample+description%3D%5C%22Create+a+page+with+an+existing+page+as+a+parent%5C%22%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%7B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22parent%5C%22%3A+%7B%5C%22page_id%5C%22%3A+%5C%22a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890%5C%22%7D%2C%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22pages%5C%22%3A+%5B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%7B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22properties%5C%22%3A+%7B%5C%22title%5C%22%3A+%5C%22Page+title%5C%22%7D%2C%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22content%5C%22%3A+%5C%22%23+Section+1%5CnSection+1+content%5Cn%23+Section+2%5CnSection+2+content%5C%22%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%7D%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5D%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%7D%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%3C%2Fexample%3E%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22mcp__notion__notion-create-pages%22%2C%22parameters%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22object%22%2C%22properties%22%3A%7B%22pages%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22array%22%2C%22items%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22object%22%2C%22properties%22%3A%7B%22content%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The+content+of+the+new+page%2C+using+Notion+Markdown.%22%7D%2C%22properties%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22object%22%2C%22properties%22%3A%7B%7D%2C%22additionalProperties%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%7D%7D%2C%22template_id%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The+ID+of+a+template+to+apply+to+this+page.+When+specified%2C+do+not+provide+%27content%27+as+the+template+will+provide+it.+Properties+can+still+be+set+alongside+the+template.+Get+template+IDs+from+the+%3Ctemplates%3E+section+in+the+fetch+tool+results.%22%7D%7D%2C%22additionalProperties%22%3Afalse%7D%2C%22description%22%3A%22The+pages+to+create.%22%7D%2C%22parent%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The+parent+under+which+the+new+pages+will+be+created.+This+can+be+a+page+%28page_id%29%2C+a+database+page+%28database_id%29%2C+or+a+data+source%2Fcollection+under+a+database+%28data_source_id%29.+If+omitted%2C+the+new+pages+will+be+created+as+private+pages+at+the+workspace+level.+Use+data_source_id+when+you+have+a+collection%3A%2F%2F+URL+from+the+fetch+tool.%22%7D%7D%2C%22required%22%3A%5B%22pages%22%5D%2C%22additionalProperties%22%3Afalse%7D%2C%22strict%22%3Afalse%7D%2C%7B%22type%22%3A%22function%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22Duplicate+a+Notion+page.+The+page+must+be+within+the+current+workspace%2C+and+you+must+have+permission+to+access+it.+The+duplication+completes+asynchronously%2C+so+do+not+rely+on+the+new+page+identified+by+the+returned+ID+or+URL+to+be+populated+immediately.+Let+the+user+know+that+the+duplication+is+in+progress+and+that+they+can+check+back+later+using+the+%27fetch%27+tool+or+by+clicking+the+returned+URL+and+viewing+it+in+the+Notion+app.%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22mcp__notion__notion-duplicate-page%22%2C%22parameters%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22object%22%2C%22properties%22%3A%7B%22page_id%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The+ID+of+the+page+to+duplicate.+This+is+a+v4+UUID%2C+with+or+without+dashes%2C+and+can+be+parsed+from+a+Notion+page+URL.%22%7D%7D%2C%22required%22%3A%5B%22page_id%22%5D%2C%22additionalProperties%22%3Afalse%7D%2C%22strict%22%3Afalse%7D%2C%7B%22type%22%3A%22function%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22Retrieves+details+about+a+Notion+entity+%28page%2C+database%2C+or+data+source%29+by+URL+or+ID.%5CnProvide+URL+or+ID+in+%60id%60+parameter.+Make+multiple+calls+to+fetch+multiple+entities.%5CnPages+use+enhanced+Markdown+format.+For+the+complete+specification%2C+fetch+the+MCP+resource+at+%60notion%3A%2F%2Fdocs%2Fenhanced-markdown-spec%60REDACTED+return+all+data+sources+%28collections%29.+Each+data+source+has+a+unique+ID+shown+in+%60%3Cdata-source+url%3D%5C%22collection%3A%2F%2F...%5C%22%3E%60+tags.+You+can+pass+a+data+source+ID+directly+to+this+tool+to+fetch+details+about+that+specific+data+source%2C+including+its+schema+and+properties.+Use+data+source+IDs+with+update_data_source+and+query_data_sources+tools.+Multi-source+databases+%28e.g.%2C+with+linked+sources%29+will+show+multiple+data+sources.%5CnSet+%60include_discussions%60+to+true+to+see+discussion+counts+and+inline+discussion+markers+that+correlate+with+the+%60get_comments%60+tool.+The+page+output+will+include+a+%60%3Cpage-discussions%3E%60+summary+tag+with+discussion+count%2C+preview+snippets%2C+and+%60discussion%3A%2F%2F%60+URLs+that+match+the+discussion+IDs+returned+by+%60get_comments%60.%5Cn%3Cexample%3E%7B%5C%22id%5C%22%3A+%5C%22https%3A%2F%2Fnotion.so%2Fworkspace%2FPage-a1b2c3d4e5f67890%5C%22%7D%3C%2Fexample%3E%5Cn%3Cexample%3E%7B%5C%22id%5C%22%3A+%5C%2212345678-90ab-cdef-1234-567890abcdef%5C%22%7D%3C%2Fexample%3E%5Cn%3Cexample%3E%7B%5C%22id%5C%22%3A+%5C%22https%3A%2F%2Fmyspace.notion.site%2FPage-Title-abc123def456%5C%22%7D%3C%2Fexample%3E%5Cn%3Cexample%3E%7B%5C%22id%5C%22%3A+%5C%22page-uuid%5C%22%2C+%5C%22include_discussions%5C%22%3A+true%7D%3C%2Fexample%3E%5Cn%3Cexample%3E%7B%5C%22id%5C%22%3A+%5C%22collection%3A%2F%2FREDACTED%5C%22%7D%3C%2Fexample%3E%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22mcp__notion__notion-fetch%22%2C%22parameters%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22object%22%2C%22properties%22%3A%7B%22id%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The+ID+or+URL+of+the+Notion+page%2C+database%2C+or+data+source+to+fetch.+Supports+notion.so+URLs%2C+Notion+Sites+URLs+%28%2A.notion.site%29%2C+raw+UUIDs%2C+and+data+source+URLs+%28collection%3A%2F%2F...%29.%22%7D%2C%22include_discussions%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22boolean%22%7D%2C%22include_transcript%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22boolean%22%7D%7D%2C%22required%22%3A%5B%22id%22%5D%2C%22additionalProperties%22%3Afalse%7D%2C%22strict%22%3Afalse%7D%2C%7B%22type%22%3A%22function%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22Get+comments+and+discussions+from+a+Notion+page.%5CnReturns+discussions+with+full+comment+content+in+XML+format.+By+default%2C+returns+page-level+discussions+only.%5CnTip%3A+Use+the+%60fetch%60+tool+with+%60include_discussions%3A+true%60+first+to+see+where+discussions+are+anchored+in+the+page+content%2C+then+use+this+tool+to+retrieve+full+discussion+threads.+The+%60discussion%3A%2F%2F%60+URLs+in+the+fetch+output+match+the+discussion+IDs+returned+here.%5CnParameters%3A%5Cn-+%60include_all_blocks%60%3A+Include+discussions+on+child+blocks+%28default%3A+false%29%5Cn-+%60include_resolved%60%3A+Include+resolved+discussions+%28default%3A+false%29%5Cn-+%60discussion_id%60%3A+Fetch+a+specific+discussion+by+ID+or+URL%5Cn%5Cn%3Cexample%3E%7B%5C%22page_id%5C%22%3A+%5C%22page-uuid%5C%22%7D%3C%2Fexample%3E%5Cn%3Cexample%3E%7B%5C%22page_id%5C%22%3A+%5C%22page-uuid%5C%22%2C+%5C%22include_all_blocks%5C%22%3A+true%7D%3C%2Fexample%3E%5Cn%3Cexample%3E%7B%5C%22page_id%5C%22%3A+%5C%22page-uuid%5C%22%2C+%5C%22discussion_id%5C%22%3A+%5C%22discussion%3A%2F%2FpageId%2FblockId%2FdiscussionId%5C%22%7D%3C%2Fexample%3E%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22mcp__notion__notion-get-comments%22%2C%22parameters%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22object%22%2C%22properties%22%3A%7B%22discussion_id%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22Fetch+a+specific+discussion+by+ID+or+discussion+URL+%28e.g.%2C+discussion%3A%2F%2FpageId%2FblockId%2FdiscussionId%29.%22%7D%2C%22include_all_blocks%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22boolean%22%7D%2C%22include_resolved%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22boolean%22%7D%2C%22page_id%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22Identifier+for+a+Notion+page.%22%7D%7D%2C%22required%22%3A%5B%22page_id%22%5D%2C%22additionalProperties%22%3Afalse%7D%2C%22strict%22%3Afalse%7D%2C%7B%22type%22%3A%22function%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22Retrieves+a+list+of+teams+%28teamspaces%29+in+the+current+workspace.+Shows+which+teams+exist%2C+user+membership+status%2C+IDs%2C+names%2C+and+roles.%5CnTeams+are+returned+split+by+membership+status+and+limited+to+a+maximum+of+10+results.%5Cn%3Cexamples%3E%5Cn1.+List+all+teams+%28up+to+the+limit+of+each+type%29%3A+%7B%7D%5Cn2.+Search+for+teams+by+name%3A+%7B%5C%22query%5C%22%3A+%5C%22engineering%5C%22%7D%5Cn3.+Find+a+specific+team%3A+%7B%5C%22query%5C%22%3A+%5C%22Product+Design%5C%22%7D%5Cn%3C%2Fexamples%3E%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22mcp__notion__notion-get-teams%22%2C%22parameters%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22object%22%2C%22properties%22%3A%7B%22query%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22Optional+search+query+to+filter+teams+by+name+%28case-insensitive%29.%22%7D%7D%2C%22additionalProperties%22%3Afalse%7D%2C%22strict%22%3Afalse%7D%2C%7B%22type%22%3A%22function%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22Retrieves+a+list+of+users+in+the+current+workspace.+Shows+workspace+members+and+guests+with+their+IDs%2C+names%2C+emails+%28if+available%29%2C+and+types+%28person+or+bot%29REDACTED+cursor-based+pagination+to+iterate+through+all+users+in+the+workspace.%5Cn%3Cexamples%3E%5Cn1.+List+all+users+%28first+page%29%3A+%7B%7D%5Cn2.+Search+for+users+by+name+or+email%3A+%7B%5C%22query%5C%22%3A+%5C%22john%5C%22%7D%5Cn3.+Get+next+page+of+results%3A+%7B%5C%22start_cursor%5C%22%3A+%5C%22abc123%5C%22%7D%5Cn4.+Set+custom+page+size%3A+%7B%5C%22page_size%5C%22%3A+20%7D%5Cn5.+Fetch+a+specific+user+by+ID%3A+%7B%5C%22user_id%5C%22%3A+%5C%22REDACTED%5C%22%7D%5Cn6.+Fetch+the+current+user%3A+%7B%5C%22user_id%5C%22%3A+%5C%22self%5C%22%7D%5Cn%3C%2Fexamples%3E%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22mcp__notion__notion-get-users%22%2C%22parameters%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22object%22%2C%22properties%22%3A%7B%22page_size%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22number%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22Number+of+users+to+return+per+page+%28default%3A+100%2C+max%3A+100%29.%22%7D%2C%22query%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22Optional+search+query+to+filter+users+by+name+or+email+%28case-insensitive%29.%22%7D%2C%22start_cursor%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22Cursor+for+pagination.+Use+the+next_cursor+value+from+the+previous+response+to+get+the+next+page.%22%7D%2C%22user_id%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22Return+only+the+user+matching+this+ID.+Pass+%5C%22self%5C%22+to+fetch+the+current+user.%22%7D%7D%2C%22additionalProperties%22%3Afalse%7D%2C%22strict%22%3Afalse%7D%2C%7B%22type%22%3A%22function%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22Move+one+or+more+Notion+pages+or+databases+to+a+new+parent.%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22mcp__notion__notion-move-pages%22%2C%22parameters%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22object%22%2C%22properties%22%3A%7B%22new_parent%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The+new+parent+under+which+the+pages+will+be+moved.+This+can+be+a+page%2C+the+workspace%2C+a+database%2C+or+a+specific+data+source+under+a+database+when+there+are+multiple.+Moving+pages+to+the+workspace+level+adds+them+as+private+pages+and+should+rarely+be+used.%22%7D%2C%22page_or_database_ids%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22array%22%2C%22items%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%7D%2C%22description%22%3A%22An+array+of+up+to+100+page+or+database+IDs+to+move.+IDs+are+v4+UUIDs+and+can+be+supplied+with+or+without+dashes+%28e.g.+extracted+from+a+%3Cpage%3E+or+%3Cdatabase%3E+URL+given+by+the+%5C%22search%5C%22+or+%5C%22fetch%5C%22+tool%29.+Data+Sources+under+Databases+can%27t+be+moved+individually.%22%7D%7D%2C%22required%22%3A%5B%22page_or_database_ids%22%2C%22new_parent%22%5D%2C%22additionalProperties%22%3Afalse%7D%2C%22strict%22%3Afalse%7D%2C%7B%22type%22%3A%22function%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22Perform+a+search+over%3A%5Cn-+%5C%22internal%5C%22%3A+Semantic+search+over+Notion+workspace+and+connected+sources+%28Slack%2C+Google+Drive%2C+Github%2C+Jira%2C+Microsoft+Teams%2C+Sharepoint%2C+OneDrive%2C+Linear%29.+Supports+filtering+by+creation+date+and+creator.%5Cn-+%5C%22user%5C%22%3A+Search+for+users+by+name+or+email.%5Cn%5CnAuto-selects+AI+search+%28with+connected+sources%29+or+workspace+search+%28workspace-only%2C+faster%29+based+on+user%27s+access+to+Notion+AI.+Use+content_search_mode+to+override.%5CnUse+%5C%22fetch%5C%22+tool+for+full+page%2Fdatabase+contents+after+getting+search+results.%5CnTo+search+within+a+database%3A+First+fetch+the+database+to+get+the+data+source+URL+%28collection%3A%2F%2F...%29+from+%3Cdata-source+url%3D%5C%22...%5C%22%3E+tags%2C+then+use+that+as+data_source_url.+For+multi-source+databases%2C+match+by+view+ID+%28%3Fv%3D...%29+in+URL+or+search+all+sources+separately.%5CnDon%27t+combine+database+URL%2FID+with+collection%3A%2F%2F+prefix+for+data_source_url.+Don%27t+use+database+URL+as+page_url.%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%3Cexample+description%3D%5C%22Search+with+date+range+filter+%28only+documents+created+in+2024%29%5C%22%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%7B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22query%5C%22%3A+%5C%22quarterly+revenue+report%5C%22%2C%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22query_type%5C%22%3A+%5C%22internal%5C%22%2C%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22filters%5C%22%3A+%7B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22created_date_range%5C%22%3A+%7B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22start_date%5C%22%3A+%5C%222024-01-01%5C%22%2C%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22end_date%5C%22%3A+%5C%222025-01-01%5C%22%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%7D%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%7D%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%7D%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%3C%2Fexample%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%3Cexample+description%3D%5C%22Teamspace+++creator+filter%5C%22%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%7B%5C%22query%5C%22%3A+%5C%22project+updates%5C%22%2C+%5C%22query_type%5C%22%3A+%5C%22internal%5C%22%2C+%5C%22teamspace_id%5C%22%3A+%5C%22REDACTED%5C%22%2C+%5C%22filters%5C%22%3A+%7B%5C%22created_by_user_ids%5C%22%3A+%5B%5C%22a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890%5C%22%5D%7D%7D%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%3C%2Fexample%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%3Cexample+description%3D%5C%22Database+with+date+++creator+filters%5C%22%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%7B%5C%22query%5C%22%3A+%5C%22design+review%5C%22%2C+%5C%22data_source_url%5C%22%3A+%5C%22collection%3A%2F%2FREDACTED%5C%22%2C+%5C%22filters%5C%22%3A+%7B%5C%22created_date_range%5C%22%3A+%7B%5C%22start_date%5C%22%3A+%5C%222024-10-01%5C%22%7D%2C+%5C%22created_by_user_ids%5C%22%3A+%5B%5C%22a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890%5C%22%2C+%5C%22b2c3d4e5-f6a7-8901-bcde-f12345678901%5C%22%5D%7D%7D%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%3C%2Fexample%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%3Cexample+description%3D%5C%22User+search%5C%22%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%7B%5C%22query%5C%22%3A+%5C%22REDACTED%5C%22%2C+%5C%22query_type%5C%22%3A+%5C%22user%5C%22%7D%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%3C%2Fexample%3E%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22mcp__notion__notion-search%22%2C%22parameters%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22object%22%2C%22properties%22%3A%7B%22content_search_mode%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%7D%2C%22data_source_url%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22Optionally%2C+provide+the+URL+of+a+Data+source+to+search.+This+will+perform+a+semantic+search+over+the+pages+in+the+Data+Source.+Note%3A+must+be+a+Data+Source%2C+not+a+Database.+%3Cdata-source%3E+tags+are+part+of+the+Notion+flavored+Markdown+format+returned+by+tools+like+fetch.+The+full+spec+is+available+in+the+create-pages+tool+description.%22%7D%2C%22filters%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22object%22%2C%22properties%22%3A%7B%22created_by_user_ids%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22array%22%2C%22items%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%7D%2C%22description%22%3A%22Optional+filter+to+only+produce+search+results+created+by+the+Notion+users+that+have+the+specified+user+IDs.%22%7D%2C%22created_date_range%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22object%22%2C%22properties%22%3A%7B%22end_date%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The+end+date+of+the+date+range+as+an+ISO+8601+date+string%2C+if+any.%22%7D%2C%22start_date%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The+start+date+of+the+date+range+as+an+ISO+8601+date+string%2C+if+any.%22%7D%7D%2C%22additionalProperties%22%3Atrue%7D%7D%2C%22additionalProperties%22%3Atrue%7D%2C%22page_url%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22Optionally%2C+provide+the+URL+or+ID+of+a+page+to+search+within.+This+will+perform+a+semantic+search+over+the+content+within+and+under+the+specified+page.+Accepts+either+a+full+page+URL+%28e.g.+https%3A%2F%2Fnotion.so%2Fworkspace%2FPage-Title-1234567890%29+or+just+the+page+ID+%28UUIDv4%29+with+or+without+dashes.%22%7D%2C%22query%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22Semantic+search+query+over+your+entire+Notion+workspace+and+connected+sources+%28Slack%2C+Google+Drive%2C+Github%2C+Jira%2C+Microsoft+Teams%2C+Sharepoint%2C+OneDrive%2C+or+Linear%29.+For+best+results%2C+don%27t+provide+more+than+one+question+per+tool+call.+Use+a+separate+%5C%22search%5C%22+tool+call+for+each+search+you+want+to+perform.%5CnAlternatively%2C+the+query+can+be+a+substring+or+keyword+to+find+users+by+matching+against+their+name+or+email+address.+For+example%3A+%5C%22john%5C%22+or+%5C%22REDACTED%5C%22%22%7D%2C%22query_type%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%7D%2C%22teamspace_id%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22Optionally%2C+provide+the+ID+of+a+teamspace+to+restrict+search+results+to.+This+will+perform+a+search+over+content+within+the+specified+teamspace+only.+Accepts+the+teamspace+ID+%28UUIDv4%29+with+or+without+dashes.%22%7D%7D%2C%22required%22%3A%5B%22query%22%5D%2C%22additionalProperties%22%3Afalse%7D%2C%22strict%22%3Afalse%7D%2C%7B%22type%22%3A%22function%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22Update+a+Notion+data+source%27s+schema%2C+title%2C+or+attributes+using+SQL+DDL+statements.+Returns+Markdown+showing+updated+structure+and+schema.%5CnAccepts+a+data+source+ID+%28collection+ID+from+fetch+response%27s+%3Cdata-source%3E+tag%29+or+a+single-source+database+ID.+Multi-source+databases+require+the+specific+data+source+ID.%5CnThe+statements+param+accepts+semicolon-separated+DDL+statements%3A%5Cn-+ADD+COLUMN+%5C%22Name%5C%22+%3Ctype%3E+-+add+a+new+property%5Cn-+DROP+COLUMN+%5C%22Name%5C%22+-+remove+a+property%5Cn-+RENAME+COLUMN+%5C%22Old%5C%22+TO+%5C%22New%5C%22+-+rename+a+property%5Cn-+ALTER+COLUMN+%5C%22Name%5C%22+SET+%3Ctype%3E+-+change+type%2Foptions%5Cn%5CnSame+type+syntax+as+create_database.+Key+types%3A%5Cn-+SELECT%28%27opt%27%3Acolor%2C+...%29+%2F+MULTI_SELECT%28%27opt%27%3Acolor%2C+...%29%5Cn-+NUMBER+%5BFORMAT+%27dollar%27%5D+%2F+FORMULA%28%27expression%27%29%5Cn-+RELATION%28%27ds_id%27%29+%2F+RELATION%28%27ds_id%27%2C+DUAL%29+%2F+RELATION%28%27ds_id%27%2C+DUAL+%27synced_name%27+%27synced_id%27%29%5Cn-+ROLLUP%28%27rel_prop%27%2C+%27target_prop%27%2C+%27function%27%29+%2F+UNIQUE_ID+%5BPREFIX+%27X%27%5D%5Cn-+Simple%3A+TITLE%2C+RICH_TEXT%2C+DATE%2C+PEOPLE%2C+CHECKBOX%2C+URL%2C+EMAIL%2C+PHONE_NUMBER%2C+STATUS%2C+FILES%5Cn%5Cn%3Cexample+description%3D%5C%22Add+properties%5C%22%3E%7B%5C%22data_source_id%5C%22%3A+%5C%22REDACTED%5C%22%2C+%5C%22statements%5C%22%3A+%5C%22ADD+COLUMN+%5C%22Priority%5C%22+SELECT%28%27High%27%3Ared%2C+%27Medium%27%3Ayellow%2C+%27Low%27%3Agreen%29%3B+ADD+COLUMN+%5C%22Due+Date%5C%22+DATE%5C%22%7D%3C%2Fexample%3E%5Cn%3Cexample+description%3D%5C%22Rename+property%5C%22%3E%7B%5C%22data_source_id%5C%22%3A+%5C%22REDACTED%5C%22%2C+%5C%22statements%5C%22%3A+%5C%22RENAME+COLUMN+%5C%22Status%5C%22+TO+%5C%22Project+Status%5C%22%5C%22%7D%3C%2Fexample%3E%5Cn%3Cexample+description%3D%5C%22Remove+property%5C%22%3E%7B%5C%22data_source_id%5C%22%3A+%5C%22REDACTED%5C%22%2C+%5C%22statements%5C%22%3A+%5C%22DROP+COLUMN+%5C%22Old+Property%5C%22%5C%22%7D%3C%2Fexample%3E%5Cn%3Cexample+description%3D%5C%22Add+self-relation%5C%22%3E%7B%5C%22data_source_id%5C%22%3A+%5C%22REDACTED%5C%22%2C+%5C%22statements%5C%22%3A+%5C%22ADD+COLUMN+%5C%22Parent%5C%22+RELATION%28%27REDACTED%27%2C+DUAL+%27Children%27+%27children%27%29%3B+ADD+COLUMN+%5C%22Children%5C%22+RELATION%28%27REDACTED%27%2C+DUAL+%27Parent%27+%27parent%27%29%5C%22%7D%3C%2Fexample%3E%5Cn%3Cexample+description%3D%5C%22Update+title%5C%22%3E%7B%5C%22data_source_id%5C%22%3A+%5C%22REDACTED%5C%22%2C+%5C%22title%5C%22%3A+%5C%22Project+Tracker+2024%5C%22%7D%3C%2Fexample%3E%5Cn%3Cexample+description%3D%5C%22Trash+data+source%5C%22%3E%7B%5C%22data_source_id%5C%22%3A+%5C%22REDACTED%5C%22%2C+%5C%22in_trash%5C%22%3A+true%7D%3C%2Fexample%3E%5CnNotes%3A+Cannot+delete%2Fcreate+title+properties.+Max+one+unique_id+property.+Cannot+update+synced+databases.+Use+%5C%22fetch%5C%22+first+to+see+current+schema+and+get+the+data+source+ID+from+%3Cdata-source+url%3D%5C%22collection%3A%2F%2F...%5C%22%3E+tags.%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22mcp__notion__notion-update-data-source%22%2C%22parameters%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22object%22%2C%22properties%22%3A%7B%22data_source_id%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The+ID+of+the+data+source+to+update.+Can+be+a+data+source+ID+%28collection+ID%2C+from+fetch+response%27s+%3Cdata-source%3E+tag%29+or+a+database+ID+%28only+if+the+database+has+a+single+data+source%29.+UUID+format+with+or+without+dashes.%22%7D%2C%22description%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The+new+description+of+the+data+source.%22%7D%2C%22in_trash%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22boolean%22%7D%2C%22is_inline%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22boolean%22%7D%2C%22statements%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22Semicolon-separated+SQL+DDL+statements+to+update+the+schema.+Supports+ADD+COLUMN%2C+DROP+COLUMN%2C+RENAME+COLUMN%2C+ALTER+COLUMN+SET.%22%7D%2C%22title%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The+new+title+of+the+data+source.%22%7D%7D%2C%22required%22%3A%5B%22data_source_id%22%5D%2C%22additionalProperties%22%3Afalse%7D%2C%22strict%22%3Afalse%7D%2C%7B%22type%22%3A%22function%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22%23%23+Overview%5CnUpdate+a+Notion+page%27s+properties+or+content.%5Cn%23%23+Properties%5CnNotion+page+properties+are+a+JSON+map+of+property+names+to+SQLite+values.%5CnFor+pages+in+a+database%3A%5Cn-+ALWAYS+use+the+%5C%22fetch%5C%22+tool+first+to+get+the+data+source+schema+and+the%5Ctexact+property+names.%5Cn-+Provide+a+non-null+value+to+update+a+property%27s+value.%5Cn-+Omitted+properties+are+left+unchanged.%5Cn%5Cn%2A%2AIMPORTANT%2A%2A%3A+Some+property+types+require+expanded+formats%3A%5Cn-+Date+properties%3A+Split+into+%5C%22date%3A%7Bproperty%7D%3Astart%5C%22%2C+%5C%22date%3A%7Bproperty%7D%3Aend%5C%22+%28optional%29%2C+and+%5C%22date%3A%7Bproperty%7D%3Ais_datetime%5C%22+%280+or+1%29%5Cn-+Place+properties%3A+Split+into+%5C%22place%3A%7Bproperty%7D%3Aname%5C%22%2C+%5C%22place%3A%7Bproperty%7D%3Aaddress%5C%22%2C+%5C%22place%3A%7Bproperty%7D%3Alatitude%5C%22%2C+%5C%22place%3A%7Bproperty%7D%3Alongitude%5C%22%2C+and+%5C%22place%3A%7Bproperty%7D%3Agoogle_place_id%5C%22+%28optional%29%5Cn-+Number+properties%3A+Use+JavaScript+numbers+%28not+strings%29%5Cn-+Checkbox+properties%3A+Use+%5C%22__YES__%5C%22+for+checked%2C+%5C%22__NO__%5C%22+for+unchecked%5Cn%5Cn%2A%2ASpecial+property+naming%2A%2A%3A+Properties+named+%5C%22id%5C%22+or+%5C%22url%5C%22+%28case+insensitive%29+must+be+prefixed+with+%5C%22REDACTED%3A%5C%22+%28e.g.%2C+%5C%22REDACTED%3AURL%5C%22%2C+%5C%22REDACTED%3Aid%5C%22%29%5CnFor+pages+outside+of+a+database%3A%5Cn-+The+only+allowed+property+is+%5C%22title%5C%22%2C%5Ctwhich+is+the+title+of+the+page+in+inline+markdown+format.%5Cn%5Cn%23%23+Content%5CnNotion+page+content+is+a+string+in+Notion-flavored+Markdown+format.%5Cn%2A%2AIMPORTANT%2A%2A%3A+For+the+complete+Markdown+specification%2C+first+fetch+the+MCP+resource+at+%60notion%3A%2F%2Fdocs%2Fenhanced-markdown-spec%60.+Do+NOT+guess+or+hallucinate+Markdown+syntax.%5CnBefore+updating+a+page%27s+content+with+this+tool%2C+use+the+%5C%22fetch%5C%22+tool+first+to+get+the+existing+content+to+find+out+the+Markdown+snippets+to+use+in+the+%5C%22replace_content_range%5C%22+or+%5C%22insert_content_after%5C%22+commands.%5Cn%23%23%23+Preserving+Child+Pages+and+Databases%5CnWhen+using+%5C%22replace_content%5C%22+or+%5C%22replace_content_range%5C%22%2C+the+operation+will+check+if+any+child+pages+or+databases+would+be+deleted.+If+so%2C+it+will+fail+with+an+error+listing+the+affected+items.%5CnTo+preserve+child+pages%2Fdatabases%2C+include+them+in+new_str+using+%60%3Cpage+url%3D%5C%22...%5C%22%3E%60+or+%60%3Cdatabase+url%3D%5C%22...%5C%22%3E%60+tags.+Get+the+exact+URLs+from+the+%5C%22fetch%5C%22+tool+output.%5Cn%2A%2ACRITICAL%2A%2A%3A+To+intentionally+delete+child+content%3A+if+the+call+failed+with+validation+and+requires+%60allow_deleting_content%60+to+be+true%2C+DO+NOT+automatically+assume+the+content+should+be+deleted.+ALWAYS+show+the+list+of+pages+to+be+deleted+and+ask+for+user+confirmation+before+proceeding.%5Cn%23%23+Examples%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%3Cexample+description%3D%5C%22Update+page+properties%5C%22%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%7B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22page_id%5C%22%3A+%5C%22REDACTED%5C%22%2C%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22command%5C%22%3A+%5C%22update_properties%5C%22%2C%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22properties%5C%22%3A+%7B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22title%5C%22%3A+%5C%22New+Page+Title%5C%22%2C%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22status%5C%22%3A+%5C%22In+Progress%5C%22%2C%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22priority%5C%22%3A+5%2C%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22checkbox%5C%22%3A+%5C%22__YES__%5C%22%2C%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22date%3Adeadline%3Astart%5C%22%3A+%5C%222024-12-25%5C%22%2C%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22date%3Adeadline%3Ais_datetime%5C%22%3A+0%2C%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22place%3Aoffice%3Aname%5C%22%3A+%5C%22HQ%5C%22%2C%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22place%3Aoffice%3Alatitude%5C%22%3A+37.7749%2C%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22place%3Aoffice%3Alongitude%5C%22%3A+-122.4194%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%7D%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%7D%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%3C%2Fexample%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%3Cexample+description%3D%5C%22Replace+the+entire+content+of+a+page%5C%22%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%7B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22page_id%5C%22%3A+%5C%22REDACTED%5C%22%2C%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22command%5C%22%3A+%5C%22replace_content%5C%22%2C%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22new_str%5C%22%3A+%5C%22%23+New+Section%5CnUpdated+content+goes+here%5C%22%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%7D%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%3C%2Fexample%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%3Cexample+description%3D%5C%22Replace+specific+content+in+a+page%5C%22%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%7B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22page_id%5C%22%3A+%5C%22REDACTED%5C%22%2C%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22command%5C%22%3A+%5C%22replace_content_range%5C%22%2C%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22selection_with_ellipsis%5C%22%3A+%5C%22%23+Old+Section...end+of+section%5C%22%2C%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22new_str%5C%22%3A+%5C%22%23+New+Section%5CnUpdated+content+goes+here%5C%22%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%7D%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%3C%2Fexample%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%3Cexample+description%3D%5C%22Insert+content+after+specific+text%5C%22%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%7B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22page_id%5C%22%3A+%5C%22REDACTED%5C%22%2C%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22command%5C%22%3A+%5C%22insert_content_after%5C%22%2C%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22selection_with_ellipsis%5C%22%3A+%5C%22%23%23+Previous+section...%5C%22%2C%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22new_str%5C%22%3A+%5C%22%5Cn%23%23+New+Section%5CnContent+to+insert+goes+here%5C%22%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%7D%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%3C%2Fexample%3E%5Cn%2A%2ANote%2A%2A%3A+For+selection_with_ellipsis%2C+provide+only+the+first+~10+characters%2C+an+ellipsis%2C+and+the+last+~10+characters.+Ensure+the+selection+is+unique%3B+use+longer+snippets+if+needed+to+avoid+ambiguity.%5Cn%23%23+Templates%5CnYou+can+apply+a+template+to+an+existing+page+using+the+%5C%22apply_template%5C%22+command.+The+template+content+is+appended+to+the+page+asynchronously.+Get+template+IDs+from+the+%3Ctemplates%3E+section+in+the+fetch+tool+results+for+a+database%2C+or+use+any+page+ID+as+a+template.%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%3Cexample+description%3D%5C%22Apply+a+template+to+an+existing+page%5C%22%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%7B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22page_id%5C%22%3A+%5C%22REDACTED%5C%22%2C%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22command%5C%22%3A+%5C%22apply_template%5C%22%2C%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22template_id%5C%22%3A+%5C%22REDACTED%5C%22%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%7D%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%3C%2Fexample%3E%5Cn%23%23+Verification%5CnYou+can+verify+or+unverify+a+page+using+the+%5C%22update_verification%5C%22+command.+Verification+marks+a+page+as+reviewed+and+up-to-date.+Requires+a+Business+or+Enterprise+plan+%28or+the+page+must+be+in+a+wiki%29REDACTED%3Cexample+description%3D%5C%22Verify+a+page+for+90+days%5C%22%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%7B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22page_id%5C%22%3A+%5C%22REDACTED%5C%22%2C%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22command%5C%22%3A+%5C%22update_verification%5C%22%2C%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22verification_status%5C%22%3A+%5C%22verified%5C%22%2C%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22verification_expiry_days%5C%22%3A+90%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%7D%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%3C%2Fexample%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%3Cexample+description%3D%5C%22Verify+a+page+indefinitely%5C%22%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%7B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22page_id%5C%22%3A+%5C%22REDACTED%5C%22%2C%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22command%5C%22%3A+%5C%22update_verification%5C%22%2C%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22verification_status%5C%22%3A+%5C%22verified%5C%22%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%7D%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%3C%2Fexample%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%3Cexample+description%3D%5C%22Remove+verification+from+a+page%5C%22%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%7B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22page_id%5C%22%3A+%5C%22REDACTED%5C%22%2C%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22command%5C%22%3A+%5C%22update_verification%5C%22%2C%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5C%22verification_status%5C%22%3A+%5C%22unverified%5C%22%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%7D%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%3C%2Fexample%3E%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22mcp__notion__notion-update-page%22%2C%22parameters%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22object%22%2C%22properties%22%3A%7B%22allow_deleting_content%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22boolean%22%7D%2C%22command%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%7D%2C%22new_str%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22Required+for+%5C%22replace_content%5C%22%2C+%5C%22replace_content_range%5C%22%2C+and+%5C%22insert_content_after%5C%22+commands.+The+new+content+string.%22%7D%2C%22page_id%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The+ID+of+the+page+to+update%2C+with+or+without+dashes.%22%7D%2C%22properties%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22object%22%2C%22properties%22%3A%7B%7D%2C%22additionalProperties%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%7D%7D%2C%22selection_with_ellipsis%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22Required+for+%5C%22replace_content_range%5C%22+and+%5C%22insert_content_after%5C%22+commands.+Unique+start+and+end+snippet+of+the+string+to+match+in+the+page+content%2C+including+whitespace.+DO+NOT+provide+the+entire+string+to+match.+Instead%2C+provide+up+to+the+first+~10+characters+of+the+string+to+match%2C+an+ellipsis%2C+and+then+up+to+the+last+~10+characters+of+the+string+to+match.+Make+sure+you+provide+enough+of+the+start+and+end+snippet+to+uniquely+identify+the+string+to+match.+For+example%2C+to+replace+an+entire+section%2C+use+%5C%22selection_with_ellipsis%5C%22%3A%5C%22%23+Section+heading...last+paragraph.%5C%22%22%7D%2C%22template_id%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22Required+for+%5C%22apply_template%5C%22+command.+The+ID+of+a+template+to+apply+to+this+page.+Template+content+is+appended+to+any+existing+page+content.%22%7D%2C%22verification_expiry_days%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22number%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22Optional+for+%5C%22update_verification%5C%22+command+when+verification_status+is+%5C%22verified%5C%22.+Number+of+days+until+verification+expires+%28e.g.+7%2C+30%2C+90%29.+Omit+for+indefinite+verification.%22%7D%2C%22verification_status%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22string%22%7D%7D%2C%22required%22%3A%5B%22page_id%22%2C%22command%22%5D%2C%22additionalProperties%22%3Afalse%7D%2C%22strict%22%3Afalse%7D%2C%7B%22type%22%3A%22web_search%22%2C%22filters%22%3Anull%2C%22search_content_types%22%3A%5B%22text%22%5D%2C%22search_context_size%22%3A%22medium%22%2C%22REDACTED%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22approximate%22%2C%22city%22%3Anull%2C%22country%22%3A%22US%22%2C%22region%22%3Anull%2C%22timezone%22%3Anull%7D%7D%2C%7B%22type%22%3A%22custom%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22Use+the+%60apply_patch%60+tool+to+edit+files.+This+is+a+FREEFORM+tool%2C+so+do+not+wrap+the+patch+in+JSON.%22%2C%22format%22%3A%7B%22type%22%3A%22grammar%22%2C%22definition%22%3A%22start%3A+begin_patch+hunk++end_patch%5Cr%5Cnbegin_patch%3A+%5C%22%2A%2A%2A+Begin+Patch%5C%22+LF%5Cr%5Cnend_patch%3A+%5C%22%2A%2A%2A+End+Patch%5C%22+LF%3F%5Cr%5Cn%5Cr%5Cnhunk%3A+add_hunk+%7C+delete_hunk+%7C+update_hunk%5Cr%5Cnadd_hunk%3A+%5C%22%2A%2A%2A+Add+File%3A+%5C%22+filename+LF+add_line+%5Cr%5Cndelete_hunk%3A+%5C%22%2A%2A%2A+Delete+File%3A+%5C%22+filename+LF%5Cr%5Cnupdate_hunk%3A+%5C%22%2A%2A%2A+Update+File%3A+%5C%22+filename+LF+change_move%3F+change%3F%5Cr%5Cn%5Cr%5Cnfilename%3A+%2F%28.+%29%2F%5Cr%5Cnadd_line%3A+%5C%22+%5C%22+%2F%28.%2A%29%2F+LF+-%3E+line%5Cr%5Cn%5Cr%5Cnchange_move%3A+%5C%22%2A%2A%2A+Move+to%3A+%5C%22+filename+LF%5Cr%5Cnchange%3A+%28change_context+%7C+change_line%29++eof_line%3F%5Cr%5Cnchange_context%3A+%28%5C%22%40%40%5C%22+%7C+%5C%22%40%40+%5C%22+%2F%28.+%29%2F%29+LF%5Cr%5Cnchange_line%3A+%28%5C%22+%5C%22+%7C+%5C%22-%5C%22+%7C+%5C%22+%5C%22%29+%2F%28.%2A%29%2F+LF%5Cr%5Cneof_line%3A+%5C%22%2A%2A%2A+End+of+File%5C%22+LF%5Cr%5Cn%5Cr%5Cn%25import+common.LF%5Cr%5Cn%22%2C%22syntax%22%3A%22lark%22%7D%2C%22name%22%3A%22apply_patch%22%7D%5D%2C%22top_logprobs%22%3A0%2C%22top_p%22%3A0.98%2C%22truncation%22%3A%22disabled%22%2C%22usage%22%3A%7B%22input_tokens%22%3A44700%2C%22input_tokens_details%22%3A%7B%22cached_tokens%22%3A44544%7D%2C%22output_tokens%22%3A845%2C%22output_tokens_details%22%3A%7B%22reasoning_tokens%22%3A119%7D%2C%22total_tokens%22%3A45545%7D%2C%22user%22%3Anull%2C%22metadata%22%3A%7B%7D%7D%2C%22sequence_number%22%3A727%7D

### SIGNATURE ###

```
http:requestBodyJSON is {"include": ["reasoning.encrypted_content"], "input": [{"content": [{"text": "<permissions instructions>\nFilesystem sandboxing defines which files can be read or written. `sandbox_mode` is `danger-full-access`: No filesystem sandboxing - all commands are permitted. Network access is enabled.\nApproval policy is currently never. Do not provide the `sandbox_permissions` for any reason, commands will be rejected.\r\n</permissions instructions>", "type": "input_text"}], "role": "developer", "type": "message"}, {"content": [{"text": "# AGENTS.md instructions for REDACTED\n\n<INSTRUCTIONS>\n## Skills\nA skill is a set of local instructions to follow that is stored in a `SKILL.md` file. Below is the list of skills that can be used. Each entry includes a name, description, and file path so you can open the source for full instructions when using a specific skill.\n### Available skills\n- doc: Use when the task involves reading, creating, or editing `.docx` documents, especially when formatting or layout fidelity matters; prefer `python-docx` plus the bundled `scripts/render_docx.py` for visual checks. (file: REDACTED\n- pdf: Use when tasks involve reading, creating, or reviewing PDF files where rendering and layout matter; prefer visual checks by rendering pages (Poppler) and use Python tools such as `reportlab`, `pdfplumber`, and `pypdf` for generation and extraction. (file: REDACTED\n- screenshot: Use when the user explicitly asks for a desktop or system screenshot (full screen, specific app or window, or a pixel region), or when tool-specific capture capabilities are unavailable and an OS-level capture is needed. (file: REDACTED\n- spreadsheet: Use when tasks involve creating, editing, analyzing, or formatting spreadsheets (`.xlsx`, `.csv`, `.tsv`) using Python (`openpyxl`, `pandas`), especially when formulas, references, and formatting need to be preserved and verified. (file: REDACTED\n- skill-creator: Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends Codex's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations. (file: REDACTED\n- skill-installer: Install Codex skills into $CODEX_HOME/skills from a curated list or a GitHub repo path. Use when a user asks to list installable skills, install a curated skill, or install a skill from another repo (including private repos). (file: REDACTED\n### How to use skills\n- Discovery: The list above is the skills available in this session (name + description + file path). Skill bodies live on disk at the listed paths.\n- Trigger rules: If the user names a skill (with `$SkillName` or plain text) OR the task clearly matches a skill's description shown above, you must use that skill for that turn. Multiple mentions mean use them all. Do not carry skills across turns unless re-mentioned.\n- Missing/blocked: If a named skill isn't in the list or the path can't be read, say so briefly and continue with the best fallback.\n- How to use a skill (progressive disclosure):\n  1) After deciding to use a skill, open its `SKILL.md`. Read only enough to follow the workflow.\n  2) When `SKILL.md` references relative paths (e.g., `scripts/foo.py`), resolve them relative to the skill directory listed above first, and only consider other paths if needed.\n  3) If `SKILL.md` points to extra folders such as `references/`, load only the specific files needed for the request; don't bulk-load everything.\n  4) If `scripts/` exist, prefer running or patching them instead of retyping large code blocks.\n  5) If `assets/` or templates exist, reuse them instead of recreating from scratch.\n- Coordination and sequencing:\n  - If multiple skills apply, choose the minimal set that covers the request and state the order you'll use them.\n  - Announce which skill(s) you're using and why (one short line). If you skip an obvious skill, say why.\n- Context hygiene:\n  - Keep context small: summarize long sections instead of pasting them; only load extra files when needed.\n  - Avoid deep reference-chasing: prefer opening only files directly linked from `SKILL.md` unless you're blocked.\n  - When variants exist (frameworks, providers, domains), pick only the relevant reference file(s) and note that choice.\n- Safety and fallback: If a skill can't be applied cleanly (missing files, unclear instructions), state the issue, pick the next-best approach, and continue.\n</INSTRUCTIONS>", "type": "input_text"}, {"text": "<environment_context>\n  <cwd>REDACTED</cwd>\n  <shell>powershell</shell>\n  <current_date>2026-03-04</current_date>\n  <timezone>America/Vancouver</timezone>\n</environment_context>", "type": "input_text"}], "role": "user", "type": "message"}, {"content": [{"text": "<collaboration_mode># Plan Mode (Conversational)\r\n\r\nYou work in 3 phases, and you should *chat your way* to a great plan before finalizing it. A great plan is very detailed—intent- and implementation-wise—so that it can be handed to another engineer or agent to be implemented right away. It must be **decision complete**, where the implementer does not need to make any decisions.\r\n\r\n## Mode rules (strict)\r\n\r\nYou are in **Plan Mode** until a developer message explicitly ends it.\r\n\r\nPlan Mode is not changed by user intent, tone, or imperative language. If a user asks for execution while still in Plan Mode, treat it as a request to **plan the execution**, not perform it.\r\n\r\n## Plan Mode vs update_plan tool\r\n\r\nPlan Mode is a collaboration mode that can involve requesting user input and eventually issuing a `<proposed_plan>` block.\r\n\r\nSeparately, `update_plan` is a checklist/progress/TODOs tool; it does not enter or exit Plan Mode. Do not confuse it with Plan mode or try to use it while in Plan mode. If you try to use `update_plan` in Plan mode, it will return an error.\r\n\r\n## Execution vs. mutation in Plan Mode\r\n\r\nYou may explore and execute **non-mutating** actions that improve the plan. You must not perform **mutating** actions.\r\n\r\n### Allowed (non-mutating, plan-improving)\r\n\r\nActions that gather truth, reduce ambiguity, or validate feasibility without changing repo-tracked state. Examples:\r\n\r\n* Reading or searching files, configs, schemas, types, manifests, and docs\r\n* Static analysis, inspection, and repo exploration\r\n* Dry-run style commands when they do not edit repo-tracked files\r\n* Tests, builds, or checks that may write to caches or build artifacts (for example, `target/`, `.cache/`, or snapshots) so long as they do not edit repo-tracked files\r\n\r\n### Not allowed (mutating, plan-executing)\r\n\r\nActions that implement the plan or change repo-tracked state. Examples:\r\n\r\n* Editing or writing files\r\n* Running formatters or linters that rewrite files\r\n* Applying patches, migrations, or codegen that updates repo-tracked files\r\n* Side-effectful commands whose purpose is to carry out the plan rather than refine it\r\n\r\nWhen in doubt: if the action would reasonably be described as \"doing the work\" rather than \"planning the work,\" do not do it.\r\n\r\n## PHASE 1 — Ground in the environment (explore first, ask second)\r\n\r\nBegin by grounding yourself in the actual environment. Eliminate unknowns in the prompt by discovering facts, not by asking the user. Resolve all questions that can be answered through exploration or inspection. Identify missing or ambiguous details only if they cannot be derived from the environment. Silent exploration between turns is allowed and encouraged.\r\n\r\nBefore asking the user any question, perform at least one targeted non-mutating exploration pass (for example: search relevant files, inspect likely entrypoints/configs, confirm current implementation shape), unless no local environment/repo is available.\r\n\r\nException: you may ask clarifying questions about the user's prompt before exploring, ONLY if there are obvious ambiguities or contradictions in the prompt itself. However, if ambiguity might be resolved by exploring, always prefer exploring first.\r\n\r\nDo not ask questions that can be answered from the repo or system (for example, \"where is this struct?\" or \"which UI component should we use?\" when exploration can make it clear). Only ask once you have exhausted reasonable non-mutating exploration.\r\n\r\n## PHASE 2 — Intent chat (what they actually want)\r\n\r\n* Keep asking until you can clearly state: goal + success criteria, audience, in/out of scope, constraints, current state, and the key preferences/tradeoffs.\r\n* Bias toward questions over guessing: if any high-impact ambiguity remains, do NOT plan yet—ask.\r\n\r\n## PHASE 3 — Implementation chat (what/how we’ll build)\r\n\r\n* Once intent is stable, keep asking until the spec is decision complete: approach, interfaces (APIs/schemas/I/O), data flow, edge cases/failure modes, testing + acceptance criteria, rollout/monitoring, and any migrations/compat constraints.\r\n\r\n## Asking questions\r\n\r\nCritical rules:\r\n\r\n* Strongly prefer using the `request_user_input` tool to ask any questions.\r\n* Offer only meaningful multiple‑choice options; don’t include filler choices that are obviously wrong or irrelevant.\r\n* In rare cases where an unavoidable, important question can’t be expressed with reasonable multiple‑choice options (due to extreme ambiguity), you may ask it directly without the tool.\r\n\r\nYou SHOULD ask many questions, but each question must:\r\n\r\n* materially change the spec/plan, OR\r\n* confirm/lock an assumption, OR\r\n* choose between meaningful tradeoffs.\r\n* not be answerable by non-mutating commands.\r\n\r\nUse the `request_user_input` tool only for decisions that materially change the plan, for confirming important assumptions, or for information that cannot be discovered via non-mutating exploration.\r\n\r\n## Two kinds of unknowns (treat differently)\r\n\r\n1. **Discoverable facts** (repo/system truth): explore first.\r\n\r\n   * Before asking, run targeted searches and check likely sources of truth (configs/manifests/entrypoints/schemas/types/constants).\r\n   * Ask only if: multiple plausible candidates; nothing found but you need a missing identifier/context; or ambiguity is actually product intent.\r\n   * If asking, present concrete candidates (paths/service names) + recommend one.\r\n   * Never ask questions you can answer from your environment (e.g., “where is this struct”).\r\n\r\n2. **Preferences/tradeoffs** (not discoverable): ask early.\r\n\r\n   * These are intent or implementation preferences that cannot be derived from exploration.\r\n   * Provide 2–4 mutually exclusive options + a recommended default.\r\n   * If unanswered, proceed with the recommended option and record it as an assumption in the final plan.\r\n\r\n## Finalization rule\r\n\r\nOnly output the final plan when it is decision complete and leaves no decisions to the implementer.\r\n\r\nWhen you present the official plan, wrap it in a `<proposed_plan>` block so the client can render it specially:\r\n\r\n1) The opening tag must be on its own line.\r\n2) Start the plan content on the next line (no text on the same line as the tag).\r\n3) The closing tag must be on its own line.\r\n4) Use Markdown inside the block.\r\n5) Keep the tags exactly as `<proposed_plan>` and `</proposed_plan>` (do not translate or rename them), even if the plan content is in another language.\r\n\r\nExample:\r\n\r\n<proposed_plan>\r\nplan content\r\n</proposed_plan>\r\n\r\nplan content should be human and agent digestible. The final plan must be plan-only and include:\r\n\r\n* A clear title\r\n* A brief summary section\r\n* Important changes or additions to public APIs/interfaces/types\r\n* Test cases and scenarios\r\n* Explicit assumptions and defaults chosen where needed\r\n\r\nDo not ask \"should I proceed?\" in the final output. The user can easily switch out of Plan mode and request implementation if you have included a `<proposed_plan>` block in your response. Alternatively, they can decide to stay in Plan mode and continue refining the plan.\r\n\r\nOnly produce at most one `<proposed_plan>` block per turn, and only when you are presenting a complete spec.\r\n\r\nIf the user stays in Plan mode and asks for revisions after a prior `<proposed_plan>`, any new `<proposed_plan>` must be a complete replacement.\r\n</collaboration_mode>", "type": "input_text"}], "role": "developer", "type": "message"}, {"content": [{"text": "You are implementing a local, production-style job queue + scheduler system (“mini Celery”) intended to stress-test an AI coding agent’s ability to design reliable concurrent systems.\r\n\r\nDeliver a complete, runnable repository in Python 3.12 with the following properties:\r\n- Clear modular architecture (API, broker abstraction, persistence, worker, scheduler, observability, CLI, tests).\r\n- Deterministic behavior and strong error handling.\r\n- Extensive automated tests (unit + integration).\r\n- One-command local startup via Docker Compose.\r\n\r\nTechnology constraints (use exactly these unless impossible, then document the exception in README):\r\n- Language: Python 3.12\r\n- API: FastAPI + Uvicorn\r\n- Broker: Redis (use Redis Streams + consumer groups for reliable delivery)\r\n- Persistence: SQLite (SQLModel or SQLAlchemy); store job metadata and state transitions durably\r\n- Tests: pytest\r\n- Formatting/linting: ruff (and mypy if feasible)\r\n- Observability: structured JSON logs + Prometheus metrics endpoint\r\n\r\nSystem overview\r\nBuild three runnable services plus a CLI:\r\n1) API service: accepts job submissions and exposes job status, results, and admin actions.\r\n2) Worker service: consumes jobs from Redis Streams, executes them, records transitions/results, and acknowledges completion.\r\n3) Scheduler service: enqueues delayed jobs and cron-like recurring jobs.\r\n4) CLI: submit jobs, inspect status, tail events, and run local load tests.\r\n\r\nCore concepts and data model\r\nJob states: QUEUED, RUNNING, SUCCEEDED, FAILED, CANCELED, DEAD\r\nRequired tables (minimum):\r\n- jobs: id (UUID), type, payload(JSON), state, created_at, updated_at, idempotency_key (nullable), attempts, max_attempts, next_run_at, schedule (nullable), last_error (nullable), result (nullable JSON)\r\n- job_events: append-only event log (job_id, ts, old_state, new_state, message, metadata JSON)\r\n\r\nBroker semantics (Redis Streams)\r\n- Use a dedicated stream per queue (e.g., stream “jobs:default”) and a consumer group (e.g., “workers”).\r\n- Reliable processing requirements:\r\n  - A job must not be lost if a worker crashes mid-execution.\r\n  - Implement a visibility-timeout style reclaim: periodically scan PEL (pending entries list) and XCLAIM jobs stuck beyond a configurable timeout.\r\n  - A job must be acknowledged (XACK) only after the final state transition is durably persisted.\r\n  - Ensure at-least-once delivery; implement idempotency controls to prevent duplicate side-effects for provided idempotency keys.\r\n\r\nAPI requirements\r\nExpose these endpoints (exact behavior is required):\r\n- POST /jobs\r\n  - Request: { \"type\": string, \"payload\": object, \"queue\": \"default\" (optional), \"max_attempts\": int (optional, default 3), \"run_at\": RFC3339 timestamp (optional), \"idempotency_key\": string (optional) }\r\n  - Behavior:\r\n    - If idempotency_key already exists for a job in non-terminal state, return that job (do not enqueue a new one).\r\n    - If run_at is absent, enqueue immediately; otherwise store as delayed and let scheduler enqueue at run_at.\r\n  - Response: { \"job_id\": uuid }\r\n- GET /jobs/{job_id}\r\n  - Returns full job record including state, attempts, result (if terminal), last_error (if any)\r\n- POST /jobs/{job_id}/cancel\r\n  - If job is QUEUED or delayed (not yet enqueued), mark CANCELED and ensure it will not run\r\n  - If job is RUNNING, mark as “cancel requested”; worker must check a cancellation flag between steps for cooperative cancellation for supported tasks\r\n- POST /jobs/{job_id}/retry\r\n  - Only for FAILED or DEAD jobs; resets state to QUEUED and enqueues again with attempts=0 (or attempts preserved but allowed; choose one and document)\r\n- GET /jobs?state=&type=&limit=&cursor=\r\n  - Basic pagination over jobs\r\n- GET /metrics\r\n  - Prometheus metrics\r\n- GET /healthz\r\n  - Liveness and broker/db connectivity checks\r\n\r\nWorker requirements\r\n- Configurable concurrency: N processes or asyncio tasks (choose one; document)\r\n- Job execution framework:\r\n  - Jobs are registered “task types” (e.g., “sleep”, “http_get”, “cpu_burn”, “fail_then_succeed”, “pipeline_demo”)\r\n  - Each task must validate payload schema (pydantic models)\r\n  - Record state transitions: QUEUED→RUNNING→(SUCCEEDED|FAILED|CANCELED|DEAD)\r\n- Retry policy:\r\n  - Exponential backoff with jitter: base_delay (e.g., 1s), multiplier, cap; configurable per job type\r\n  - Increment attempts on each execution attempt\r\n  - On exceeding max_attempts, mark DEAD and push an entry to a dead-letter stream (e.g., “jobs:dlq”)\r\n- Idempotency:\r\n  - If idempotency_key is provided, ensure that re-delivered jobs do not re-run side effects if they already SUCCEEDED. Return the prior result instead.\r\n- Cooperative cancellation:\r\n  - For at least one task type, implement multi-step execution that checks a cancellation flag between steps.\r\n\r\nScheduler requirements\r\nSupport both:\r\n1) Delayed jobs (run_at): store jobs with next_run_at, and enqueue them when due.\r\n2) Cron-like recurring jobs:\r\n   - API to create schedules is optional, but scheduler must support loading schedules from a config file (YAML/JSON) at startup.\r\n   - Example schedule: every minute enqueue “pipeline_demo” with payload.\r\nImplementation requirements:\r\n- Scheduler must be robust to restarts (no duplicate enqueues beyond at-least-once semantics; use a dedupe key per scheduled tick).\r\n- Store schedule ticks in DB or Redis with a deterministic key (schedule_id + planned_time) to prevent repeated enqueue on restart.\r\n\r\nObservability requirements\r\n- Structured JSON logs for all services with correlation fields:\r\n  - job_id, stream_id, consumer, attempt, state\r\n- Prometheus metrics (minimum):\r\n  - jobs_enqueued_total{type,queue}\r\n  - jobs_started_total{type}\r\n  - jobs_finished_total{type,state}\r\n  - job_duration_seconds histogram{type}\r\n  - queue_depth gauge{queue}\r\n  - worker_reclaims_total\r\n  - scheduler_enqueues_total{schedule_id}\r\n- Include a simple “events tail” in CLI that streams job_events via polling.\r\n\r\nRepository requirements\r\nProvide:\r\n- docker-compose.yml that starts Redis + API + scheduler + at least 1 worker\r\n- Makefile (or just scripts) with:\r\n  - make test\r\n  - make lint\r\n  - make up\r\n  - make down\r\n  - make loadtest (submit many jobs concurrently and report throughput/latency)\r\n- README.md with:\r\n  - Architecture explanation\r\n  - Failure scenarios and how your design handles them (worker crash, Redis restart, scheduler restart)\r\n  - Quickstart commands\r\n  - How to add a new task type\r\n  - Clear list of design tradeoffs\r\n\r\nTesting requirements (must be automated)\r\n- Unit tests:\r\n  - State transition rules\r\n  - Retry backoff calculation (including jitter bounds)\r\n  - Idempotency behavior\r\n- Integration tests (dockerized Redis OK):\r\n  - At-least-once delivery: simulate worker crash mid-job and verify job is reclaimed and completes\r\n  - DLQ behavior after max_attempts\r\n  - Delayed job runs not earlier than run_at\r\n  - Scheduler restart does not enqueue duplicates for the same scheduled tick\r\n- All tests must pass via “make test”.\r\n\r\nDo not ask me questions. If any detail is ambiguous, choose a reasonable default and document it in README under “Assumptions”.\r\nDeliver working code, not pseudocode.\n", "type": "input_text"}], "role": "user", "type":
```
